title: AthleteEnrollment
description: Roster attachment binding an Athlete to a Team + Season. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + branch_id (RESTRICT) + team_id (RESTRICT) + athlete_id (RESTRICT) + season_id (RESTRICT). References age_group_snapshot_id (SET NULL — snapshot from athlete at submit time; not a live FK) + team_member_id (SET NULL — the TeamMember created atomically on activation) + source_trial_id (SET NULL — TeamTrial reference when enrollment_type='trial_converted'). Cascades organization + region through branch → organization/region. NEVER carries application_id, organization_id, region_id, or scope_node_id directly.

branch_id.description: Denormalised from athlete.branch_id for indexed filtering. IMMUTABLE post-create.

team_id.description: The team the athlete is enrolled in. RESTRICT — teams cannot be archived while active enrollments reference them. IMMUTABLE post-create.

athlete_id.description: The enrolled athlete. RESTRICT — athletes cannot be archived while active enrollments reference them. IMMUTABLE post-create.

season_id.description: The season this enrollment applies to. RESTRICT — seasons cannot be archived while active enrollments reference them. IMMUTABLE post-create.

age_group_snapshot_id.description: SNAPSHOT of athlete.current_age_group_id at EnrollmentSubmitted time. IMMUTABLE for the enrollment lifetime — birthday drift + AgeGroup catalog changes do NOT reshape this. SET NULL when the referenced AgeGroup is deleted (the enrollment remains valid; the snapshot is a historical marker).

team_member_id.description: The teams::TeamMember row created atomically when status → active. Null until activation. SET NULL when the TeamMember is soft-deleted (usually because the athlete left the team mid-season).

enrollment_source.description: Enum: self_serve / admin / import / migration / api / trial_conversion. How the enrollment came to be.

enrollment_type.description: Enum: regular / trial_converted / late / waitlist / provisional. regular = default; trial_converted = source_trial_id set; late = past registration_closes_at with fee; waitlist = capacity-full at enroll time; provisional = pending guardian consent for minors (Enterprise-only).

source_trial_id.description: Set when enrollment_type='trial_converted'. References the TeamTrial that converted to this enrollment. RESTRICT would be better but SET NULL matches the audit-preservation pattern.

status.description: Enum: submitted / payment_pending / consent_pending / confirmed / active / completed / withdrawn / expelled / expired / waitlisted.

position_preference.description: Sport-specific position the athlete wants (free-text in Wave 3a).

jersey_number_assigned.description: 0-999. Unique per active enrollment on the team (partial unique index).

withdrawal_reason.description: Enum: withdrew / dropped / injury / relocation / financial / disciplinary / other. Required when status='withdrawn' OR 'expelled'.

price_amount_cents.description: Enrollment fee, frozen at confirm time. Zero for free enrollments.

payment_status.description: Enum: none / pending / paid / partial / refunded / failed. Wave 4 finance hook.

consent_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the athlete's consents at confirm time — {photo_release, medical_disclosure, third_party, recorded_at, recorded_by_user_id}. Required for provisional/confirmed status transitions.

waitlist_position.description: Position in the team's waitlist queue. Null when not waitlisted. Recomputed by PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob as slots open.

indexes.name: athlete_enrollments_unique
indexes.predicate: status IN ('confirmed', 'active') AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: One active enrollment per (athlete, team, season). An athlete can be on multiple teams in one season (different sports) via distinct enrollments; they cannot be on the same team twice.

indexes.name: athlete_enrollments_jersey_unique
indexes.predicate: status IN ('active') AND jersey_number_assigned IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Jersey number uniqueness within an active team roster.

indexes.name: athlete_enrollments_team_member_idx
indexes.description: Reverse lookup — given a TeamMember, find its originating enrollment.

x-invariants: One active enrollment per (tenant_id, season_id, athlete_id, team_id) via partial unique index (status IN confirmed/active)
team_id + athlete_id + season_id + branch_id + tenant_id are IMMUTABLE post-create
age_group_snapshot_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — SNAPSHOT semantics
enrollment_type='trial_converted' requires source_trial_id set + the trial's team_id matches this enrollment's team_id + the trial's status='converted'
consent_snapshot required at status transitions confirmed/active/provisional (captured from athlete's consent state at that moment)
team_member_id populated in the same DB transaction as status → active (atomic)
jersey_number_assigned unique per (team_id, active enrollment) — enforced by partial unique index
waitlist_position required when status='waitlisted'; null otherwise

status transitions: submitted → {payment_pending, consent_pending, confirmed, waitlisted, expired}; payment_pending → {consent_pending, confirmed, expired}; consent_pending → {confirmed, expired}; confirmed → {active, expired}; active → {completed, withdrawn, expelled}; waitlisted → {submitted (promoted), expired}
